body_transformation: The blocky geometric body softens into smooth, rounded forms with delicate lavender and ivory white pastel hues, replacing sharp edges with gentle curves. Delicate crystalline veins shimmer within translucent wings extending from the shoulders, while the single eye becomes a glowing starlight silver orb with subtle petal-like shimmer. Soft petal gold accents trace the rounded ear flaps and tail tip, and the compact silhouette now features a subtle star-shaped marking on the forehead. The original dark red accents are replaced by glowing petal gold, and the light blue color palette shifts to soft pastel tones.
signature_feature: Head marking: crystalline star with petal gold veins and starlight silver glow.
